item.description:
What's New

  • mark macOS 26.3.2 as device-specific (MacBook Neo)
  • add device-specific builds and fix release dates
  • add macOS 26.4 RC
  • add type filter, shareable compare URLs, and compare-with-previous links
  • add macOS 15.6 Sequoia beta 1–3
  • add macOS 15.5 Sequoia beta 1–4
  • add macOS-15.4-24E247
  • add macOS-26.4-25E246

Fixes

  • standardize column widths across index page tables
  • deterministic sorting for releases with same version
  • replace substring expression with arithmetic for IPSW size display
  • set git user config before commit signing setup

Documentation

  • update CLAUDE.md and README.md with workflow conventions
